_meta.purpose: Bulk x3 batch 5: Lower body posterior chain, unilateral leg, hip abductor/adductor, and core (anti-extension/rotation/lateral flexion) (40 exercises)

exercises.name: Barbell Romanian Deadlift

restrictions.note: Reduce range and load while symptoms persist.

instructions: Stand with the barbell at hip level, hands shoulder-width apart.
Hinge at the hips with a slight knee bend, sliding the bar down the thighs until you feel a hamstring stretch.
Drive the hips forward to return to standing keeping the bar close to the body.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Romanian Deadlift

restrictions.note: Reduce range and load while symptoms persist.

instructions: Stand with a dumbbell in each hand resting on the front of the thighs.
Hinge at the hips with a slight knee bend, lowering the dumbbells along the legs.
Drive the hips forward to return to standing squeezing the glutes at the top.

exercises.name: Single-Leg Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Stand on one leg holding a dumbbell in the opposite hand.
Hinge at the hip extending the free leg back as the torso lowers parallel to the floor.
Return to standing under control; complete reps before switching sides.

exercises.name: Barbell Hip Thrust
instructions: Sit with the upper back against a bench and the barbell across the hips.
Drive through the heels lifting the hips until the body forms a straight line from knees to shoulders.
Lower the hips under control to the start.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Hip Thrust
instructions: Sit with the upper back against a bench and a dumbbell on the hips.
Drive through the heels lifting the hips until the body forms a straight line.
Lower the hips under control to the start.

exercises.name: Single-Leg Hip Thrust
instructions: Sit with the upper back against a bench and one foot flat on the floor.
Drive through the planted heel lifting the hips while keeping the free leg extended.
Lower under control; complete reps before switching sides.

exercises.name: Glute Bridge March
instructions: Lie on the back with knees bent and feet flat.
Lift the hips into a glute bridge.
Hold the bridge while marching one knee toward the chest, then alternate without dropping the hips.

exercises.name: Barbell Good Morning

restrictions.note: High shear load on the spine; avoid until cleared.

instructions: Stand with the barbell across the upper back, feet hip-width apart.
Hinge at the hips with a slight knee bend lowering the torso toward parallel to the floor.
Drive the hips forward to return to standing.

exercises.name: Swiss Ball Hamstring Curl
instructions: Lie on the back with the heels resting on a Swiss ball, arms by the sides.
Lift the hips into a bridge.
Pull the heels toward the glutes by bending the knees, then extend back out under control without dropping the hips.

exercises.name: Two-Handed Kettlebell Swing

restrictions.note: Reduce load and amplitude until symptoms resolve.

instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart and the kettlebell on the floor in front.
Hinge to grip the bell, hike it back between the legs and explosively snap the hips to swing it to chest height.
Let it fall back between the legs in a controlled hinge and continue.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
instructions: Stand a stride away from a bench and place the top of one foot on it behind you.
Lower into a lunge until the front thigh is parallel to the floor.
Drive through the front foot to return to standing; complete reps before switching sides.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bulgarian Split Squat
instructions: Hold a dumbbell in each hand and stand a stride away from a bench with one foot resting on it behind you.
Lower into a lunge until the front thigh is parallel to the floor.
Drive through the front foot to return to standing.

exercises.name: Front Foot Elevated Split Squat
instructions: Place the front foot on a step or low platform with the back foot on the floor in a split stance.
Lower the back knee toward the floor keeping the torso tall.
Drive through the front foot to return to standing.

exercises.name: Reverse Lunge
instructions: Stand tall with feet hip-width apart.
Step one foot back into a lunge lowering the back knee toward the floor.
Drive through the front foot to return to standing; alternate sides.

exercises.name: Walking Lunge
instructions: Stand tall with feet hip-width apart.
Step forward into a lunge lowering the back knee toward the floor.
Drive up and step the back foot through into the next lunge; continue alternating.

exercises.name: Lateral Lunge
instructions: Stand tall with feet together.
Take a wide step to one side, sit the hips back and bend that knee while the other leg stays straight.
Push back to standing and alternate sides.

exercises.name: Curtsy Lunge
instructions: Stand tall with feet hip-width apart.
Step one foot back and across the body lowering into a curtsy lunge.
Return to standing and alternate sides.

exercises.name: Assisted Pistol Squat
instructions: Hold a TRX, doorframe or post for balance and stand on one leg.
Lower into a single-leg squat extending the free leg in front.
Drive through the planted foot to return to standing.

exercises.name: Copenhagen Plank
instructions: Lie on your side with the top leg resting on a bench at ankle or knee height.
Lift the hips into a side plank pressing the top leg down on the bench.
Hold without dropping the hips for the prescribed time.

exercises.name: Side Plank Hip Lift
instructions: Set up in a side plank on the forearm with the hips lifted.
Lower the hips toward the floor and drive them back up without rotating the torso.
Complete reps before switching sides.

exercises.name: Banded Seated Hip Abduction
instructions: Sit on a bench with a mini band around the thighs just above the knees.
Press the knees apart against the band keeping the feet flat.
Return slowly to the start.

exercises.name: Banded Monster Walk
instructions: Place a mini band around the ankles or just above the knees and adopt a quarter-squat stance.
Step forward and out alternating legs to keep tension on the band.
Continue for the prescribed reps or distance.

exercises.name: Cossack Squat
instructions: Stand with feet wider than shoulder-width.
Shift the weight to one side bending that knee while the other leg stays straight with toes up.
Push back to centre and alternate sides.

exercises.name: Sumo Deadlift

restrictions.note: Reduce load and emphasise neutral spine while symptoms persist.

instructions: Stand with a wide stance and feet turned out, the barbell over the mid-foot.
Hinge to grip the bar inside the legs.
Drive the floor away pushing the hips forward to lockout.

exercises.name: Loaded Dead Bug
instructions: Lie on the back with arms straight up holding a light dumbbell and knees over the hips.
Lower the opposite arm and leg toward the floor without arching the lower back.
Return to start and alternate sides.

exercises.name: Hollow Body Hold
instructions: Lie on the back with arms overhead and legs straight.
Press the lower back into the floor and lift the shoulders and legs into a banana shape.
Hold without losing contact between the lower back and the floor.

exercises.name: Ab Wheel Rollout

restrictions.note: High anti-extension load; avoid until pain-free and cleared.
Heavy abdominal pressure; avoid during recovery.

instructions: Kneel on the floor holding an ab wheel under the shoulders.
Roll the wheel forward keeping the spine neutral and ribs down.
Pull back to the start without losing the brace.

exercises.name: Long-Lever Plank
instructions: Set up in a forearm plank with elbows extended forward of the shoulders.
Press the floor away and brace the abs without sagging the hips.
Hold for the prescribed time.

exercises.name: Body Saw Plank
instructions: Set up in a forearm plank with sliders or a towel under the feet.
Push back through the elbows so the body slides toward the heels.
Pull forward back to the plank position keeping the core braced.

exercises.name: Banded Pallof Press
instructions: Anchor a band at chest height and stand sideways gripping it with both hands at the chest.
Press the band straight out in front resisting the pull toward the anchor.
Bring the hands back to the chest under control; complete reps before switching sides.

exercises.name: Split-Stance Pallof Press
instructions: Anchor a band at chest height and assume a half-kneeling or split stance perpendicular to the anchor.
Press the band straight out resisting rotation.
Return slowly; complete reps before switching sides.

exercises.name: Half-Kneeling Chop
instructions: Anchor a band high and assume a half-kneeling stance with the inside knee down.
Pull the band diagonally down across the body to the outside hip.
Return slowly; complete reps before switching sides.

exercises.name: Half-Kneeling Lift
instructions: Anchor a band low and assume a half-kneeling stance with the outside knee down.
Pull the band diagonally up across the body to overhead on the opposite side.
Return slowly; complete reps before switching sides.

exercises.name: Bird Dog Row
instructions: Set up on three points with one knee and the opposite hand on a bench, the other arm holding a dumbbell and the free leg extended back.
Row the dumbbell to the ribs without rotating the hips.
Lower under control; complete reps before switching sides.

exercises.name: Suitcase Carry
instructions: Pick up a kettlebell with one hand and stand tall, shoulders level.
Walk forward with controlled steps resisting any lean toward the loaded side.
Continue for the prescribed time or distance; switch sides.

exercises.name: Dynamic Side Plank
instructions: Set up in a side plank on the forearm with the hips lifted.
Rotate the top arm under the body to thread the needle, then return to the open side plank.
Complete reps before switching sides.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Side Bend

restrictions.note: Lateral flexion under load can aggravate; avoid until cleared.

instructions: Stand tall with a dumbbell in one hand and the other hand on the head.
Bend laterally toward the loaded side then return to upright contracting the opposite obliques.
Complete reps before switching sides.

exercises.name: Single-Arm Farmer's Carry
instructions: Pick up a heavy dumbbell with one hand and stand tall.
Walk for the prescribed distance keeping the shoulders level and the core braced.
Switch sides and repeat.

exercises.name: Waiter Walk
instructions: Press a kettlebell or dumbbell overhead with one arm in a locked-out position.
Walk forward keeping the bell stable directly over the shoulder.
Continue for the prescribed time; switch sides.

exercises.name: Turkish Get-Up
instructions: Lie on the back with one arm pressing a kettlebell straight up toward the ceiling.
Move through the get-up sequence (roll to the elbow, post the hand, bridge the hips, sweep the leg, lunge up to standing) keeping the bell vertical at all times.
Reverse the sequence back to the floor; alternate sides.

bb_rdl_v1.name: Pes mort romanès amb barra
instructions: Dret amb la barra a l'altura del maluc, mans a l'amplada de l'espatlla.
Hinge als malucs amb una lleugera flexió de genoll, lliscant la barra per les cuixes fins notar estirament dels isquiotibials.
Empeny els malucs endavant per tornar a dret mantenint la barra a prop del cos.

db_rdl_v1.name: Pes mort romanès amb manuelles
instructions: Dret amb una manuella a cada mà recolzada davant les cuixes.
Hinge als malucs amb una lleugera flexió de genoll, baixant les manuelles al llarg de les cames.
Empeny els malucs endavant per tornar a dret prement els glutis a dalt.

single_leg_rdl_v1.name: Pes mort romanès a una cama
instructions: Dret sobre una cama amb una manuella a la mà oposada.
Hinge al maluc estenent la cama lliure enrere mentre el tronc baixa paral·lel al terra.
Torna a dret controlat; fes les reps abans de canviar.

bb_hip_thrust_v1.name: Hip thrust amb barra
instructions: Asseu-te amb l'esquena alta contra un banc i la barra sobre els malucs.
Empeny pels talons aixecant els malucs fins formar línia recta de genolls a espatlles.
Baixa controlat a l'inici.

db_hip_thrust_v1.name: Hip thrust amb manuella
instructions: Asseu-te amb l'esquena alta contra un banc i una manuella sobre els malucs.
Empeny pels talons aixecant els malucs fins línia recta.
Baixa controlat a l'inici.

single_leg_hip_thrust_v1.name: Hip thrust a una cama
instructions: Asseu-te amb l'esquena alta contra un banc i un peu pla al terra.
Empeny pel taló plantat aixecant els malucs amb la cama lliure estesa.
Baixa controlat; fes les reps abans de canviar.

glute_bridge_march_v1.name: Pont de glutis amb marxa
instructions: Estira't d'esquena amb genolls flexionats i peus plans.
Aixeca els malucs en pont de glutis.
Mantén el pont mentre puges un genoll cap al pit, alterna sense deixar caure els malucs.

bb_good_morning_v1.name: Good morning amb barra
instructions: Dret amb la barra a la part alta de l'esquena, peus a l'amplada del maluc.
Hinge als malucs amb una lleugera flexió de genoll baixant el tronc cap a paral·lel al terra.
Empeny els malucs endavant per tornar a dret.

swiss_ball_hamstring_curl_v1.name: Curl d'isquios amb fitball
instructions: Estira't d'esquena amb els talons sobre un fitball, braços als costats.
Aixeca els malucs en pont.
Tira els talons cap als glutis flexionant els genolls, després estén controlat sense deixar caure els malucs.

kb_swing_two_handed_v1.name: Swing amb kettlebell a dues mans
instructions: Dret amb peus a l'amplada de l'espatlla i la kettlebell al terra davant.
Hinge per agafar la bola, balanceja-la enrere entre les cames i fes un snap explosiu de malucs perquè pugi a l'altura del pit.
Deixa-la caure entre les cames en hinge controlat i continua.

bulgarian_split_squat_v1.name: Split squat búlgar
instructions: Dret a una passa d'un banc i recolza la part superior d'un peu al banc darrere.
Baixa a llunja fins que la cuixa davantera quedi paral·lela al terra.
Empeny pel peu davanter per tornar; fes les reps abans de canviar.

db_bulgarian_split_squat_v1.name: Split squat búlgar amb manuelles
instructions: Sostén una manuella a cada mà i posa't a una passa d'un banc amb un peu darrere recolzat.
Baixa a llunja fins paral·lel.
Empeny pel peu davanter per tornar a dret.

front_foot_elevated_split_squat_v1.name: Split squat amb peu davanter elevat
instructions: Posa el peu davanter en un step o plataforma baixa amb el peu del darrere al terra en split.
Baixa el genoll del darrere cap al terra mantenint el tronc dret.
Empeny pel peu davanter per tornar a dret.

reverse_lunge_v1.name: Llunja inversa
instructions: Dret amb peus a l'amplada del maluc.
Fes un pas enrere amb un peu a llunja baixant el genoll del darrere cap al terra.
Empeny pel peu davanter per tornar; alterna costats.

walking_lunge_v1.name: Llunja caminada
instructions: Dret amb peus a l'amplada del maluc.
Avança a una llunja baixant el genoll del darrere cap al terra.
Empeny i passa el peu del darrere a la següent llunja; alterna.

lateral_lunge_v1.name: Llunja lateral
instructions: Dret amb peus junts.
Fes una passa àmplia a un costat, recula els malucs i flexiona aquest genoll mentre l'altra cama queda recta.
Torna a dret i alterna costats.

curtsy_lunge_v1.name: Llunja reverència
instructions: Dret amb peus a l'amplada del maluc.
Fes un pas enrere i creuat baixant a llunja reverència.
Torna a dret i alterna.

pistol_squat_assisted_v1.name: Pistol squat assistit
instructions: Subjecta un TRX, marc de porta o pal per equilibri i posa't sobre una cama.
Baixa a sentadella a una cama estenent la cama lliure davant.
Empeny pel peu plantat per tornar a dret.

copenhagen_plank_v1.name: Planxa Copenhagen
instructions: Estira't de costat amb la cama de dalt recolzada en un banc a l'altura del turmell o genoll.
Aixeca els malucs en planxa lateral pressionant la cama de dalt contra el banc.
Mantén sense deixar caure els malucs el temps prescrit.

side_plank_hip_lift_v1.name: Aixecada de maluc en planxa lateral
instructions: Posició de planxa lateral sobre l'avantbraç amb malucs aixecats.
Baixa els malucs cap al terra i empeny-los amunt sense rotar el tronc.
Fes les reps abans de canviar.

band_seated_abduction_v1.name: Abducció de maluc asseguda amb banda
instructions: Asseu-te en un banc amb una mini-banda al voltant de les cuixes, just per sobre dels genolls.
Empeny els genolls cap enfora contra la banda mantenint els peus plans.
Torna lent a l'inici.

band_monster_walk_v1.name: Monster walk amb banda
instructions: Posa una mini-banda als turmells o per sobre dels genolls i adopta un quart de sentadella.
Camina endavant i enfora alternant cames mantenint tensió a la banda.
Continua per les reps o distància prescrites.

cossack_squat_v1.name: Sentadella cossack
instructions: Dret amb peus més amples que l'espatlla.
Desplaça el pes a un costat flexionant aquell genoll mentre l'altra cama queda recta amb dits amunt.
Empeny per tornar al centre i alterna.

sumo_deadlift_v1.name: Pes mort sumo
instructions: Dret amb stance ample i peus girats enfora, la barra sobre el mig del peu.
Hinge per agafar la barra dins les cames.
Empeny el terra cap avall portant els malucs endavant fins lockout.

dead_bug_loaded_v1.name: Dead bug carregat
instructions: Estira't d'esquena amb braços rectes amunt sostenint una manuella lleugera i genolls sobre malucs.
Baixa el braç i la cama oposats cap al terra sense arquejar la zona lumbar.
Torna i alterna costats.

hollow_body_hold_v1.name: Hollow body hold
instructions: Estira't d'esquena amb braços per sobre del cap i cames rectes.
Pressiona la lumbar contra el terra i aixeca espatlles i cames en forma de plàtan.
Mantén sense perdre contacte de la lumbar amb el terra.

ab_wheel_rollout_v1.name: Rollout amb roda abdominal
instructions: A genolls al terra sostenint una roda abdominal sota les espatlles.
Roda la roda endavant mantenint la columna neutra i les costelles avall.
Torna sense perdre la pressió abdominal.

plank_long_lever_v1.name: Planxa de palanca llarga
instructions: Posició de planxa amb avantbraços i colzes estesos endavant de les espatlles.
Empeny el terra i activa els abdominals sense deixar caure els malucs.
Mantén el temps prescrit.

body_saw_plank_v1.name: Body saw en planxa
instructions: Planxa amb avantbraços i sliders o tovallola sota els peus.
Empeny enrere amb els colzes perquè el cos llisqui cap als talons.
Torna endavant a la planxa mantenint el core actiu.

pallof_press_band_v1.name: Pallof press amb banda
instructions: Ancora una banda a l'altura del pit i posa't de costat agafant-la amb les dues mans al pit.
Empeny la banda recta endavant resistint l'estirada cap a l'àncora.
Torna les mans al pit controlat; fes les reps abans de canviar.

pallof_press_split_stance_v1.name: Pallof press en split
instructions: Ancora una banda a l'altura del pit i posa't en mig genoll o split perpendicular a l'àncora.
Empeny la banda recta resistint la rotació.
Torna lent; fes les reps abans de canviar.

half_kneeling_chop_v1.name: Chop en mig genoll
instructions: Ancora una banda alta i posa't en mig genoll amb el genoll de dins al terra.
Tira la banda en diagonal cap avall pel cos al maluc del costat.
Torna lent; fes les reps abans de canviar.

half_kneeling_lift_v1.name: Lift en mig genoll
instructions: Ancora una banda baixa i posa't en mig genoll amb el genoll de fora al terra.
Tira la banda en diagonal amunt pel cos cap al cap del costat oposat.
Torna lent; fes les reps abans de canviar.

bird_dog_row_v1.name: Bird dog amb rem
instructions: Tres punts: un genoll i la mà oposada en un banc, l'altre braç sostenint una manuella i la cama lliure estesa enrere.
Rema la manuella a les costelles sense rotar els malucs.
Baixa controlat; fes les reps abans de canviar.

suitcase_carry_v1.name: Carry de maleta
instructions: Agafa una kettlebell amb una mà i posa't dret amb les espatlles anivellades.
Camina amb passos controlats resistint qualsevol inclinació cap al costat carregat.
Continua pel temps o distància prescrits; canvia.

side_plank_dynamic_v1.name: Planxa lateral dinàmica
instructions: Posició de planxa lateral sobre l'avantbraç amb malucs aixecats.
Rota el braç de dalt sota el cos en thread the needle, després torna a la planxa lateral oberta.
Fes les reps abans de canviar.

db_side_bend_v1.name: Inclinació lateral amb manuella
instructions: Dret amb una manuella a una mà i l'altra mà al cap.
Inclina lateralment cap al costat carregat i torna contraient els oblics oposats.
Fes les reps abans de canviar.

single_arm_farmer_carry_v1.name: Farmer carry a un braç
instructions: Agafa una manuella pesada amb una mà i posa't dret.
Camina la distància prescrita mantenint les espatlles anivellades i el core actiu.
Canvia i repeteix.

waiter_walk_v1.name: Waiter walk
instructions: Pressiona una kettlebell o manuella sobre el cap amb un braç en lockout.
Camina endavant mantenint la bola estable sobre l'espatlla.
Continua pel temps prescrit; canvia.

turkish_get_up_kettlebell_v1.name: Turkish get-up amb kettlebell
instructions: Estira't d'esquena amb un braç pressionant una kettlebell recta amunt cap al sostre.
Mou-te per la seqüència del get-up (roda al colze, recolza la mà, pont de malucs, escombra la cama, llunja a dret) mantenint la bola vertical sempre.
Inverteix la seqüència fins al terra; alterna.

bb_rdl_v1.name: Peso muerto rumano con barra
instructions: De pie con la barra a la altura de la cadera, manos al ancho de hombros.
Hinge en caderas con ligera flexión de rodilla, deslizando la barra por los muslos hasta notar estiramiento de isquios.
Empuja las caderas adelante para volver de pie manteniendo la barra cerca del cuerpo.

db_rdl_v1.name: Peso muerto rumano con mancuernas
instructions: De pie con una mancuerna en cada mano apoyada delante de los muslos.
Hinge en caderas con ligera flexión de rodilla, bajando las mancuernas a lo largo de las piernas.
Empuja las caderas adelante para volver apretando glúteos arriba.

single_leg_rdl_v1.name: Peso muerto rumano a una pierna
instructions: De pie sobre una pierna con una mancuerna en la mano opuesta.
Hinge en cadera extendiendo la pierna libre atrás mientras el torso baja paralelo al suelo.
Vuelve de pie controlado; haz las reps antes de cambiar.

bb_hip_thrust_v1.name: Hip thrust con barra
instructions: Siéntate con la espalda alta contra un banco y la barra sobre las caderas.
Empuja por los talones levantando las caderas hasta línea recta de rodillas a hombros.
Baja controlado al inicio.

db_hip_thrust_v1.name: Hip thrust con mancuerna
instructions: Siéntate con la espalda alta contra un banco y una mancuerna sobre las caderas.
Empuja por los talones hasta línea recta.
Baja controlado al inicio.

single_leg_hip_thrust_v1.name: Hip thrust a una pierna
instructions: Siéntate con la espalda alta contra un banco y un pie plano en el suelo.
Empuja por el talón plantado levantando las caderas con la pierna libre extendida.
Baja controlado; haz las reps antes de cambiar.

glute_bridge_march_v1.name: Puente de glúteos con marcha
instructions: Túmbate de espaldas con rodillas flexionadas y pies planos.
Levanta las caderas en puente de glúteos.
Mantén el puente mientras llevas una rodilla al pecho, alterna sin dejar caer las caderas.

bb_good_morning_v1.name: Good morning con barra
instructions: De pie con la barra en la parte alta de la espalda, pies al ancho de cadera.
Hinge en caderas con ligera flexión de rodilla bajando el torso hacia paralelo al suelo.
Empuja las caderas adelante para volver de pie.

swiss_ball_hamstring_curl_v1.name: Curl de isquios con fitball
instructions: Túmbate de espaldas con los talones sobre un fitball, brazos a los lados.
Levanta las caderas en puente.
Tira los talones hacia los glúteos flexionando rodillas, luego extiende controlado sin dejar caer caderas.

kb_swing_two_handed_v1.name: Swing con kettlebell a dos manos
instructions: De pie con pies al ancho de hombros y la kettlebell en el suelo delante.
Hinge para coger la bola, balancéala atrás entre las piernas y haz un snap explosivo de caderas para que suba a la altura del pecho.
Déjala caer entre las piernas en hinge controlado y continúa.

bulgarian_split_squat_v1.name: Split squat búlgaro
instructions: De pie a un paso de un banco y apoya la parte superior de un pie en el banco detrás.
Baja a zancada hasta que el muslo delantero quede paralelo al suelo.
Empuja por el pie delantero para volver; haz las reps antes de cambiar.

db_bulgarian_split_squat_v1.name: Split squat búlgaro con mancuernas
instructions: Sostén una mancuerna en cada mano y ponte a un paso de un banco con un pie detrás apoyado.
Baja a zancada hasta paralelo.
Empuja por el pie delantero para volver de pie.

front_foot_elevated_split_squat_v1.name: Split squat con pie delantero elevado
instructions: Coloca el pie delantero en un step o plataforma baja con el pie trasero en el suelo en split.
Baja la rodilla trasera hacia el suelo manteniendo el torso erguido.
Empuja por el pie delantero para volver de pie.

reverse_lunge_v1.name: Zancada inversa
instructions: De pie con pies al ancho de cadera.
Da un paso atrás con un pie a zancada bajando la rodilla trasera al suelo.
Empuja por el pie delantero para volver; alterna lados.

walking_lunge_v1.name: Zancada caminada
instructions: De pie con pies al ancho de cadera.
Avanza a zancada bajando la rodilla trasera al suelo.
Empuja y pasa el pie trasero a la siguiente zancada; alterna.

lateral_lunge_v1.name: Zancada lateral
instructions: De pie con pies juntos.
Da un paso amplio a un lado, retrae las caderas y flexiona esa rodilla mientras la otra pierna queda recta.
Vuelve de pie y alterna lados.

curtsy_lunge_v1.name: Zancada reverencia
instructions: De pie con pies al ancho de cadera.
Da un paso atrás y cruzado bajando a zancada reverencia.
Vuelve de pie y alterna.

pistol_squat_assisted_v1.name: Pistol squat asistido
instructions: Sujeta un TRX, marco de puerta o poste para equilibrio y ponte sobre una pierna.
Baja a sentadilla a una pierna extendiendo la pierna libre delante.
Empuja por el pie plantado para volver de pie.

copenhagen_plank_v1.name: Plancha Copenhagen
instructions: Túmbate de lado con la pierna de arriba apoyada en un banco a la altura del tobillo o rodilla.
Levanta las caderas en plancha lateral presionando la pierna de arriba contra el banco.
Mantén sin dejar caer las caderas el tiempo prescrito.

side_plank_hip_lift_v1.name: Elevación de cadera en plancha lateral
instructions: Posición de plancha lateral sobre el antebrazo con caderas levantadas.
Baja las caderas hacia el suelo y empújalas arriba sin rotar el torso.
Haz las reps antes de cambiar.

band_seated_abduction_v1.name: Abducción de cadera sentada con banda
instructions: Siéntate en un banco con una mini-banda alrededor de los muslos, justo por encima de las rodillas.
Empuja las rodillas hacia fuera contra la banda manteniendo los pies planos.
Vuelve lento al inicio.

band_monster_walk_v1.name: Monster walk con banda
instructions: Coloca una mini-banda en los tobillos o por encima de las rodillas y adopta un cuarto de sentadilla.
Camina adelante y hacia fuera alternando piernas manteniendo tensión en la banda.
Continúa por las reps o distancia prescritas.

cossack_squat_v1.name: Sentadilla cossack
instructions: De pie con pies más anchos que los hombros.
Desplaza el peso a un lado flexionando esa rodilla mientras la otra pierna queda recta con dedos arriba.
Empuja para volver al centro y alterna.

sumo_deadlift_v1.name: Peso muerto sumo
instructions: De pie con stance amplio y pies girados hacia fuera, la barra sobre el medio pie.
Hinge para coger la barra dentro de las piernas.
Empuja el suelo hacia abajo llevando las caderas adelante hasta lockout.

dead_bug_loaded_v1.name: Dead bug cargado
instructions: Túmbate de espaldas con brazos rectos arriba sosteniendo una mancuerna ligera y rodillas sobre caderas.
Baja el brazo y la pierna opuestos hacia el suelo sin arquear la zona lumbar.
Vuelve y alterna lados.

hollow_body_hold_v1.name: Hollow body hold
instructions: Túmbate de espaldas con brazos por encima de la cabeza y piernas rectas.
Presiona la lumbar contra el suelo y levanta hombros y piernas en forma de plátano.
Mantén sin perder contacto de la lumbar con el suelo.

ab_wheel_rollout_v1.name: Rollout con rueda abdominal
instructions: De rodillas en el suelo sosteniendo una rueda abdominal bajo los hombros.
Rueda la rueda adelante manteniendo la columna neutra y las costillas abajo.
Vuelve sin perder la presión abdominal.

plank_long_lever_v1.name: Plancha de palanca larga
instructions: Posición de plancha con antebrazos y codos extendidos delante de los hombros.
Empuja el suelo y activa los abdominales sin dejar caer las caderas.
Mantén el tiempo prescrito.

body_saw_plank_v1.name: Body saw en plancha
instructions: Plancha con antebrazos y sliders o toalla bajo los pies.
Empuja atrás con los codos para que el cuerpo deslice hacia los talones.
Vuelve adelante a la plancha manteniendo el core activo.

pallof_press_band_v1.name: Pallof press con banda
instructions: Ancla una banda a la altura del pecho y ponte de lado cogiéndola con ambas manos al pecho.
Empuja la banda recta adelante resistiendo el tirón hacia el ancla.
Vuelve las manos al pecho controlado; haz las reps antes de cambiar.

pallof_press_split_stance_v1.name: Pallof press en split
instructions: Ancla una banda a la altura del pecho y ponte en media rodilla o split perpendicular al ancla.
Empuja la banda recta resistiendo la rotación.
Vuelve lento; haz las reps antes de cambiar.

half_kneeling_chop_v1.name: Chop en media rodilla
instructions: Ancla una banda alta y ponte en media rodilla con la rodilla de dentro en el suelo.
Tira la banda en diagonal hacia abajo por el cuerpo a la cadera del lado.
Vuelve lento; haz las reps antes de cambiar.

half_kneeling_lift_v1.name: Lift en media rodilla
instructions: Ancla una banda baja y ponte en media rodilla con la rodilla de fuera en el suelo.
Tira la banda en diagonal arriba por el cuerpo hacia la cabeza del lado opuesto.
Vuelve lento; haz las reps antes de cambiar.

bird_dog_row_v1.name: Bird dog con remo
instructions: Tres puntos: una rodilla y la mano opuesta en un banco, el otro brazo sosteniendo una mancuerna y la pierna libre extendida atrás.
Rema la mancuerna a las costillas sin rotar las caderas.
Baja controlado; haz las reps antes de cambiar.

suitcase_carry_v1.name: Carry de maleta
instructions: Coge una kettlebell con una mano y ponte de pie con los hombros nivelados.
Camina con pasos controlados resistiendo cualquier inclinación hacia el lado cargado.
Continúa por el tiempo o distancia prescritos; cambia.

side_plank_dynamic_v1.name: Plancha lateral dinámica
instructions: Posición de plancha lateral sobre el antebrazo con caderas levantadas.
Rota el brazo de arriba bajo el cuerpo en thread the needle, luego vuelve a la plancha lateral abierta.
Haz las reps antes de cambiar.

db_side_bend_v1.name: Inclinación lateral con mancuerna
instructions: De pie con una mancuerna en una mano y la otra mano en la cabeza.
Inclina lateralmente hacia el lado cargado y vuelve contrayendo los oblicuos opuestos.
Haz las reps antes de cambiar.

single_arm_farmer_carry_v1.name: Farmer carry a un brazo
instructions: Coge una mancuerna pesada con una mano y ponte de pie.
Camina la distancia prescrita manteniendo los hombros nivelados y el core activo.
Cambia y repite.

waiter_walk_v1.name: Waiter walk
instructions: Presiona una kettlebell o mancuerna sobre la cabeza con un brazo en lockout.
Camina adelante manteniendo la bola estable sobre el hombro.
Continúa por el tiempo prescrito; cambia.

turkish_get_up_kettlebell_v1.name: Turkish get-up con kettlebell
instructions: Túmbate de espaldas con un brazo presionando una kettlebell recta arriba hacia el techo.
Muévete por la secuencia del get-up (rueda al codo, apoya la mano, puente de caderas, barre la pierna, zancada a de pie) manteniendo la bola vertical siempre.
Invierte la secuencia hasta el suelo; alterna.

bb_rdl_v1.name: Barbell Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Stand with the barbell at hip level, hands shoulder-width apart.
Hinge at the hips with a slight knee bend, sliding the bar down the thighs until you feel a hamstring stretch.
Drive the hips forward to return to standing keeping the bar close to the body.

db_rdl_v1.name: Dumbbell Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Stand with a dumbbell in each hand resting on the front of the thighs.
Hinge at the hips with a slight knee bend, lowering the dumbbells along the legs.
Drive the hips forward to return to standing squeezing the glutes at the top.

single_leg_rdl_v1.name: Single-Leg Romanian Deadlift
instructions: Stand on one leg holding a dumbbell in the opposite hand.
Hinge at the hip extending the free leg back as the torso lowers parallel to the floor.
Return to standing under control; complete reps before switching sides.

bb_hip_thrust_v1.name: Barbell Hip Thrust
instructions: Sit with the upper back against a bench and the barbell across the hips.
Drive through the heels lifting the hips until the body forms a straight line from knees to shoulders.
Lower the hips under control to the start.

db_hip_thrust_v1.name: Dumbbell Hip Thrust
instructions: Sit with the upper back against a bench and a dumbbell on the hips.
Drive through the heels lifting the hips until the body forms a straight line.
Lower the hips under control to the start.

single_leg_hip_thrust_v1.name: Single-Leg Hip Thrust
instructions: Sit with the upper back against a bench and one foot flat on the floor.
Drive through the planted heel lifting the hips while keeping the free leg extended.
Lower under control; complete reps before switching sides.

glute_bridge_march_v1.name: Glute Bridge March
instructions: Lie on the back with knees bent and feet flat.
Lift the hips into a glute bridge.
Hold the bridge while marching one knee toward the chest, then alternate without dropping the hips.

bb_good_morning_v1.name: Barbell Good Morning
instructions: Stand with the barbell across the upper back, feet hip-width apart.
Hinge at the hips with a slight knee bend lowering the torso toward parallel to the floor.
Drive the hips forward to return to standing.

swiss_ball_hamstring_curl_v1.name: Swiss Ball Hamstring Curl
instructions: Lie on the back with the heels resting on a Swiss ball, arms by the sides.
Lift the hips into a bridge.
Pull the heels toward the glutes by bending the knees, then extend back out under control without dropping the hips.

kb_swing_two_handed_v1.name: Two-Handed Kettlebell Swing
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart and the kettlebell on the floor in front.
Hinge to grip the bell, hike it back between the legs and explosively snap the hips to swing it to chest height.
Let it fall back between the legs in a controlled hinge and continue.

bulgarian_split_squat_v1.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
instructions: Stand a stride away from a bench and place the top of one foot on it behind you.
Lower into a lunge until the front thigh is parallel to the floor.
Drive through the front foot to return to standing; complete reps before switching sides.

db_bulgarian_split_squat_v1.name: Dumbbell Bulgarian Split Squat
instructions: Hold a dumbbell in each hand and stand a stride away from a bench with one foot resting on it behind you.
Lower into a lunge until the front thigh is parallel to the floor.
Drive through the front foot to return to standing.

front_foot_elevated_split_squat_v1.name: Front Foot Elevated Split Squat
instructions: Place the front foot on a step or low platform with the back foot on the floor in a split stance.
Lower the back knee toward the floor keeping the torso tall.
Drive through the front foot to return to standing.

reverse_lunge_v1.name: Reverse Lunge
instructions: Stand tall with feet hip-width apart.
Step one foot back into a lunge lowering the back knee toward the floor.
Drive through the front foot to return to standing; alternate sides.

walking_lunge_v1.name: Walking Lunge
instructions: Stand tall with feet hip-width apart.
Step forward into a lunge lowering the back knee toward the floor.
Drive up and step the back foot through into the next lunge; continue alternating.

lateral_lunge_v1.name: Lateral Lunge
instructions: Stand tall with feet together.
Take a wide step to one side, sit the hips back and bend that knee while the other leg stays straight.
Push back to standing and alternate sides.

curtsy_lunge_v1.name: Curtsy Lunge
instructions: Stand tall with feet hip-width apart.
Step one foot back and across the body lowering into a curtsy lunge.
Return to standing and alternate sides.

pistol_squat_assisted_v1.name: Assisted Pistol Squat
instructions: Hold a TRX, doorframe or post for balance and stand on one leg.
Lower into a single-leg squat extending the free leg in front.
Drive through the planted foot to return to standing.

copenhagen_plank_v1.name: Copenhagen Plank
instructions: Lie on your side with the top leg resting on a bench at ankle or knee height.
Lift the hips into a side plank pressing the top leg down on the bench.
Hold without dropping the hips for the prescribed time.

side_plank_hip_lift_v1.name: Side Plank Hip Lift
instructions: Set up in a side plank on the forearm with the hips lifted.
Lower the hips toward the floor and drive them back up without rotating the torso.
Complete reps before switching sides.

band_seated_abduction_v1.name: Banded Seated Hip Abduction
instructions: Sit on a bench with a mini band around the thighs just above the knees.
Press the knees apart against the band keeping the feet flat.
Return slowly to the start.

band_monster_walk_v1.name: Banded Monster Walk
instructions: Place a mini band around the ankles or just above the knees and adopt a quarter-squat stance.
Step forward and out alternating legs to keep tension on the band.
Continue for the prescribed reps or distance.

cossack_squat_v1.name: Cossack Squat
instructions: Stand with feet wider than shoulder-width.
Shift the weight to one side bending that knee while the other leg stays straight with toes up.
Push back to centre and alternate sides.

sumo_deadlift_v1.name: Sumo Deadlift
instructions: Stand with a wide stance and feet turned out, the barbell over the mid-foot.
Hinge to grip the bar inside the legs.
Drive the floor away pushing the hips forward to lockout.

dead_bug_loaded_v1.name: Loaded Dead Bug
instructions: Lie on the back with arms straight up holding a light dumbbell and knees over the hips.
Lower the opposite arm and leg toward the floor without arching the lower back.
Return to start and alternate sides.

hollow_body_hold_v1.name: Hollow Body Hold
instructions: Lie on the back with arms overhead and legs straight.
Press the lower back into the floor and lift the shoulders and legs into a banana shape.
Hold without losing contact between the lower back and the floor.

ab_wheel_rollout_v1.name: Ab Wheel Rollout
instructions: Kneel on the floor holding an ab wheel under the shoulders.
Roll the wheel forward keeping the spine neutral and ribs down.
Pull back to the start without losing the brace.

plank_long_lever_v1.name: Long-Lever Plank
instructions: Set up in a forearm plank with elbows extended forward of the shoulders.
Press the floor away and brace the abs without sagging the hips.
Hold for the prescribed time.

body_saw_plank_v1.name: Body Saw Plank
instructions: Set up in a forearm plank with sliders or a towel under the feet.
Push back through the elbows so the body slides toward the heels.
Pull forward back to the plank position keeping the core braced.

pallof_press_band_v1.name: Banded Pallof Press
instructions: Anchor a band at chest height and stand sideways gripping it with both hands at the chest.
Press the band straight out in front resisting the pull toward the anchor.
Bring the hands back to the chest under control; complete reps before switching sides.

pallof_press_split_stance_v1.name: Split-Stance Pallof Press
instructions: Anchor a band at chest height and assume a half-kneeling or split stance perpendicular to the anchor.
Press the band straight out resisting rotation.
Return slowly; complete reps before switching sides.

half_kneeling_chop_v1.name: Half-Kneeling Chop
instructions: Anchor a band high and assume a half-kneeling stance with the inside knee down.
Pull the band diagonally down across the body to the outside hip.
Return slowly; complete reps before switching sides.

half_kneeling_lift_v1.name: Half-Kneeling Lift
instructions: Anchor a band low and assume a half-kneeling stance with the outside knee down.
Pull the band diagonally up across the body to overhead on the opposite side.
Return slowly; complete reps before switching sides.

bird_dog_row_v1.name: Bird Dog Row
instructions: Set up on three points with one knee and the opposite hand on a bench, the other arm holding a dumbbell and the free leg extended back.
Row the dumbbell to the ribs without rotating the hips.
Lower under control; complete reps before switching sides.

suitcase_carry_v1.name: Suitcase Carry
instructions: Pick up a kettlebell with one hand and stand tall, shoulders level.
Walk forward with controlled steps resisting any lean toward the loaded side.
Continue for the prescribed time or distance; switch sides.

side_plank_dynamic_v1.name: Dynamic Side Plank
instructions: Set up in a side plank on the forearm with the hips lifted.
Rotate the top arm under the body to thread the needle, then return to the open side plank.
Complete reps before switching sides.

db_side_bend_v1.name: Dumbbell Side Bend
instructions: Stand tall with a dumbbell in one hand and the other hand on the head.
Bend laterally toward the loaded side then return to upright contracting the opposite obliques.
Complete reps before switching sides.

single_arm_farmer_carry_v1.name: Single-Arm Farmer's Carry
instructions: Pick up a heavy dumbbell with one hand and stand tall.
Walk for the prescribed distance keeping the shoulders level and the core braced.
Switch sides and repeat.

waiter_walk_v1.name: Waiter Walk
instructions: Press a kettlebell or dumbbell overhead with one arm in a locked-out position.
Walk forward keeping the bell stable directly over the shoulder.
Continue for the prescribed time; switch sides.

turkish_get_up_kettlebell_v1.name: Turkish Get-Up
instructions: Lie on the back with one arm pressing a kettlebell straight up toward the ceiling.
Move through the get-up sequence (roll to the elbow, post the hand, bridge the hips, sweep the leg, lunge up to standing) keeping the bell vertical at all times.
Reverse the sequence back to the floor; alternate sides.
